name: echo-test
describe: Live test: read the issue and answer it as a comment.

inputs.name: issue
inputs.describe: GitHub issue number to work on.

claudeCode.systemPromptAppend:
# Final message format (required)
Your FINAL message MUST be exactly this block:

DONE
PR_SUMMARY:
<your complete answer to the issue — this text is posted verbatim as a comment>

If you cannot answer, output a single line instead: FAILED: <reason>
